app.name: Power RAG
app.tagline: Intelligent document Q&A with multi-LLM support

sidebar.noDocuments: No documents ingested yet. Upload files to get started.

chat.placeholder: Ask about your documents, Jira project KAN, time, weather, or paste a URL…
chat.startConversation: Start a conversation by asking a question.
chat.cacheHitNoticeBody: This reply was retrieved from Redis (similar question was answered before). The chat model was not run again for this message.
chat.mcpNotConfigured: No MCP client in this deployment (MCP is off in default application.yml). With dev profile: pip3 install -r backend/mcp/requirements.txt (fetch_url, time, weather, Jira, GitHub, GCP logs). Docker backend image installs the same.
chat.mcpNotAttached: MCP client is on, but tools are not attached to RAG chat (powerrag.mcp.rag-enabled is false).
chat.mcpNoTools: MCP client reported no tools yet (server may still be starting).
chat.mcpPanelHint: The model may call these tools when your question needs live data: web pages, current time, weather, Jira (if configured), mailbox (if email-accounts.json is set up), GitHub, or GCP logs.
chat.jiraMcpPanelHint: Use natural language in the chat box below, or the shortcut buttons, to query Jira.
chat.jiraQuickHint: Ask in plain language. The assistant can search issues and open a ticket by key when MCP tools are enabled.
chat.jiraChipList: List the latest tickets in Jira project KAN
chat.jiraChipOpen: Which KAN tickets are open or in progress?
chat.jiraChipOne: Summarize Jira issue KAN-5 for me
chat.sourceCitations: Sources — open document or show panel
chat.openSourceNewTab: Open full document in a new tab (from your knowledge base)
chat.showSourcesPanel: Scroll to Sources panel for excerpts

upload.title: Upload Documents
upload.dropzone: Drop files here or click to browse

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.comingSoon: Admin features will be available in Phase 8.

sql.title: Database Query
sql.subtitle: Ask questions in natural language — Power RAG translates them to SQL and runs them against the grants database.
sql.placeholder: e.g. Show all approved applications with their amounts
sql.noResults: Enter a question to query the database.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.guardrailBlock: This request was blocked by content guidelines.
